theme_strategy.vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, developer-tool, minimalist professional. 'Set once, forget forever'.

typography.setup: Import via Google Fonts in index.css
rules: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Headings (Size > 32px): MUST use tracking-tight.
Overlines / Labels: MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
File paths, rules, and logs MUST use mono_font for readability and technical aesthetic.
Hierarchy Gap Rule: The jump between a heading and its subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Color is Function Only: 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action.
Hover states MUST explicitly change text color and background to maintain contrast.
Destructive actions (Delete Rule, Undo) MUST use the destructive red.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous Spacing: p-4, p-6, p-8. Use ample white space to reduce cognitive load.
rules: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap Strategy: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6).
Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (e.g., p-6) to prevent text collision.
Use Optical Alignment for icons within buttons or lists.

surface_strategies.cards_and_widgets: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look): Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout. Subtly rounded (max 8px). Flat solid backgrounds, no drop shadows.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid Background with a hard bottom border. If content scrolls under it, use Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 with 1px delicate inner stroke).
surface_strategies.interactive_elements: Sharp inner contrasts. Flat solid, 1px subtle border.

rules: Animations: Minimalist — use micro-interactions for feedback.
Hover states: Subtle background darkening or lightening.
Transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out).
Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Ensure all Shadcn components are generated/adapted for .js/.jsx.
Use Shadcn components for tables, switches (On/Off toggle), inputs, forms, tabs, and dialogs.
Do NOT overuse the generic Card component. Go cardless, rectangular, and dense.
Use Sonner for toast notifications (rule applied, file organized, etc.).

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-rule-button', data-testid='monitoring-toggle').

images.description: Minimalist geometric grid pattern on pure white. Use for empty state backgrounds or 'no rules' illustrations. In dark mode, apply `invert` or `opacity` filter via CSS.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design files as .jsx or .js, as TypeScript is not used.
Build the dashboard using a fixed sidebar or top nav layout, focusing on the content.
Create main views: Dashboard (Monitoring Status toggle, Quick Stats), Rules Manager (add/edit/delete/reorder by file type/keyword), Activity Log (history with undo).
Implement 'Preview Before Apply' as a Dialog showing old vs new file names.
Include 'Rule Templates' (Student, Freelancer, Developer presets) as quick-add buttons.
Renaming Templates configuration should use the mono_font.
Adhere strictly to the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype: monochrome, high precision, technical aesthetic.
